title: CTOV - Vending Machine compat
description: Compatibility datapack between CTOV and Vending Machine mod
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Vending machine. You will find some vending machines in villages. 1.19+ datapack is for Forge.

**Vending machines mod**

Vending machines mod can be obtained from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vending-machine)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
